name: Chatwith
tagline: Manage and query custom website-trained chatbots
description: List and manage Chatwith chatbots, inspect account details, and send questions to a chatbot. Requires a paid Chatwith plan and an API key from account settings.

auth.hint: Copy the API key from the Chatwith Dashboard Account page and send it as Authorization: Bearer <API_TOKEN>. API access requires a paid plan.

tools.name: get_current_user
tools.description: Return account information for the user associated with the supplied Chatwith API token.

tools.name: list_chatbots
tools.description: List the authenticated user's chatbots and their current configuration metadata.

tools.name: get_chatbot
tools.description: Get one chatbot by UUID, including its model, prompt, display settings, and status fields.

tools.name: send_chatbot_message
tools.description: Send a question to a chatbot and return its answer; optionally continue a UUID4 conversation and request a non-streaming JSON response.

params.name: message
params.description: Non-empty question or instruction to send to the chatbot.

params.name: conversationId
params.description: UUID4 conversation identifier. Omit it to start a new conversation.

params.name: stream
params.description: Whether to stream the response; defaults to true. Set false with Accept: application/json to receive the conversation ID.

params.name: Accept
params.description: Response format: application/json or text/plain; defaults to text/plain.
